title: MES production walkthrough (UI)
description: Golden production MES: OEE + batch screens.
prompt: Install mes-platform-production and walk an operator through OEE dashboard and batch-run screens without using admin editors.
uiJourney: Solutions → Deploy → Operator OEE + batch tabs
humanSteps: Open Operator; open OEE screen; confirm KPIs render.
Open batch-run screen; confirm phase paths/list load.
